generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a senior citizen, I've seen how our security agencies have struggled to keep up with modern threats. The recent attacks in [City] showed that our current laws are outdated. We need to give our agencies the tools they need to protect us. Some worry about civil liberties, but we can't let fear of overreach stop us from keeping our communities safe. Our grandchildren deserve to live in a secure country. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurFuture
